title: Xtra Crisp Canadian Cannellini Beans Casserole
description: A salty, crisp, and crowd-pleasing Canadian dish featuring cannellini beans, cooked to perfection in a clay pot, and suitable for sugar-free diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large clay pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chopped smoked bacon and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add the cannellini beans, chicken broth, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the clay pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the cover and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
If using grated cheddar cheese, sprinkle it on top of the casserole and return it to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
